overall.description: First-person exploration through a post-apocalyptic urban combat zone in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks past an overturned car through a dusty construction area with abandoned vehicles, unfinished skyscrapers, and the Pacifica stadium visible in the distance. Warm golden hour lighting illuminates the palm-tree lined streets with Tyger Claws gang tags visible on buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned street with overturned vehicle and stadium view

events.description: begins walking forward past the overturned yellow car
moves from immediate car vicinity into the open street with clearer view of stadium

agents.ego_description: exploring the abandoned street, moving past the wrecked vehicle toward the distant stadium

entered.detail: wrecked yellow sports car lying on its side with visible undercarriage
red neon gang signage on the side of a derelict building
large circular stadium structure with geodesic dome framework visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the abandoned street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside an overturned yellow sports car on a dusty abandoned street. The player begins walking forward past the wreck, with the massive Pacifica stadium visible in the distance and Tyger Claws gang signage glowing on a nearby building. Palm trees and unfinished skyscrapers frame the scene under warm golden hour lighting.

events.description: passes close to abandoned truck on the right side of the street
yellow construction barriers become prominent along the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the street, passing the abandoned truck and approaching the construction zone

entered.detail: large beige cargo truck parked on the side of the road with covered bed
bright yellow construction barriers lining the sidewalk
tall buildings under construction with exposed scaffolding and cranes

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the street past the overturned car, approaching an abandoned truck parked on the right. Yellow construction barriers line the sidewalk as the stadium shifts to the left side of the frame. The street continues toward the construction cranes and unfinished skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: active construction site with heavy machinery

events.description: passes construction workers in yellow safety vests standing near barriers
approaches large orange excavator and heavy construction machinery

agents.ego_description: walking through the active construction zone, passing workers and approaching heavy equipment

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow safety vest standing near the barriers

entered.detail: large orange construction excavator with extended arm positioned in the street
multiple tower cranes towering over the unfinished buildings

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more open construction area where workers in yellow vests stand near barriers. An orange excavator dominates the center of the road ahead, with multiple construction cranes visible against the sky. The Pacifica stadium remains visible to the left as the player approaches the heavy machinery.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction plaza with stadium structure

events.description: moves into wider plaza area with stadium structure now prominent on left
slight left turn while passing the stadium structure

agents.ego_description: continuing through the combat zone, moving past the stadium and deeper into the construction area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal shirt and shorts crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: large wall with colorful graffiti murals and gang tags

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a wider plaza area where the Pacifica stadium looms larger on the left. A pedestrian crosses the street ahead, and graffiti-covered walls line the right side. The construction barriers and excavator fall behind as the player continues toward the dense cluster of unfinished skyscrapers and rising smoke in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dusty urban combat zone that transitions from a narrow, wreck-strewn street into a wide, industrial construction plaza. It begins beside an overturned yellow sports car, moving forward past glowing Tyger Claws signage and palm trees under the warm glow of golden hour. As the camera advances, the view shifts past an abandoned truck and yellow construction barriers, with the massive Pacifica stadium sliding toward the left of the frame. The scene then opens into a construction area where the camera passes workers in yellow vests and an orange excavator before moving into a wider plaza. Finally, the perspective pushes past a lone pedestrian and graffiti-covered walls, heading toward a dense cluster of unfinished skyscrapers and rising smoke in the distance.
